Article 2.heading: This Order shall take effect from the date of signature. Order No. 2 of 2007 shall remain in full force and effect save as amended by this Order. This Order shall be known as The DIFC Small Claims Tribunal – Additional Members of the SCT Order No. 2 of 2017

Article 3.heading: The Rules of the DIFC Courts (the “RDC”) contain at Part 53 the rules relating to the SCT; and

Article 4.heading: The SCT is recognised as a mechanism for the prompt and cost-effi cient hearing and determination of smaller claims within the of the DIFC Courts. jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/)
